info.title: databinding.LivingDoc.Report.CLI
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 databinding.LivingDoc.Report.CLI
-f, --filepath                  Required. Path to the LivingDoc Json Output
-i, --runtimeInformationPath    Path to the RuntimeInformation.json from
*.Action.WebApplikation or
WinFormsApplikation-Plugin
-l, --reportlanguage            (Default: de) Language of generated Report
(de, en)
-r, --reportName                (Default: report.html) Name of the generated
HTML Report
-p, --workItemPrefix            Prefix of the Tag for Link to WorkItem
-t, --workItemUrlTemplate       Url-Template link to the Backlog-Management
Tool
-m, --manualTestTag             (Default: @ManuellerTest) Tagname to identify
manual testscenarios
-h, --reportHeader              Name of the header to generate for report
-b, --buildInfo                 Build details of tested application
-e                              Handle status unkown in report as error
-x, --excludeTags               Features and Scenarios tagged with this tags
are exclued from the report. Separate multiple
tags with a comma. Example: @Sprint2,@Sprint4
--help                          Display this help screen.
--version                       Display version information.
